candidate_definition_hints.text: A [Jupyter](https://jupyter.org/) kernel for [Logtalk](https://logtalk.org/) based on [prolog-jupyter-kernel](https://github.com/hhu-stups/prolog-jupyter-kernel) and [IPython kernel](https://github.com/ipython/ipykernel).
